job.title: Software Developer (Software Development Engineer 3 – RAID / UEFI / Linux) (KA, IN)
job.description:
ID - 1690-1 - Software Developer

Location: Bangalore

Experience: 5-8 Years

Quantity - 1

Software Development Engineer 3 – RAID (UEFI / Linux) THE ROLE The Bengaluru team is responsible for the development, validation, and delivery of AMD RAID software solutions for laptops, desktops, and workstation platforms supporting the AMD RAID ecosystem. Our scope spans the full software stack—from firmware and pre-OS components in UEFI to operating system drivers and user-space applications across Linux and Windows environments. As a Software Development Engineer in this team, you will contribute to the design and development of Software RAID solutions across UEFI and Linux platforms, working on firmware components, low-level system software, and device drivers. This role offers the opportunity to work closely with hardware and software teams on storage technologies, platform enablement, driver development, and debugging for next-generation AMD platforms. You will be part of a highly collaborative engineering team involved in the full product lifecycle, including architecture, design, implementation, integration, validation, and customer issue resolution. THE PERSON We are looking for a versatile and highly motivated engineer with strong system software fundamentals and a passion for low-level development. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience in Linux device driver development, solid programming skills in C/C++, and a good understanding of firmware and operating system internals. You should be comfortable working across software layers—from UEFI/firmware to Linux kernel drivers—and enjoy solving complex technical problems in storage and platform software. Experience in RAID, storage subsystems, or device-driver debugging will be a strong advantage. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES **Design, develop, and maintain UEFI drivers, UEFI applications, and Linux device drivers for AMD RAID and storage solutions.**  Contribute to the development of Software RAID features and enhancements across UEFI and Linux environments. **Develop and maintain UEFI HII components for RAID/storage configuration and management.**  Support the end-to-end lifecycle of RAID software solutions, including design, implementation, integration, validation, debugging, and release. **Work on Linux kernel-level software and driver development for storage and platform enablement.**  Debug and resolve issues across firmware, Linux kernel drivers, and system software layers. **Collaborate with cross-functional teams including firmware, hardware, validation, and platform engineering teams to deliver high-quality RAID solutions.**  Work closely with global teams, vendors, and customers to analyze issues, drive root-cause resolution, and ensure successful product delivery. PREFERRED EXPERIENCE **Strong programming skills in C/C++ for systems software development.**  Hands-on experience in Linux device driver development, Linux kernel debugging, and low-level software development. **Good understanding of Linux kernel architecture, kernel modules, memory management, synchronization, interrupt handling, and debugging techniques.**  Solid understanding of UEFI architecture, UEFI drivers, UEFI applications, and related libraries. **Experience with UEFI HII development is highly desirable.**  Good understanding of operating systems, data structures, computer architecture, and x86-64 platform architecture. **Experience with storage technologies / RAID / SATA / NVMe / SCSI subsystems is a strong plus.**  Familiarity with firmware, BIOS/UEFI, pre-OS environments, and OS-driver interaction. **Exposure to Windows device driver development/debugging is an added advantage.**  Proficiency in Python, Shell scripting, and Linux system development is desirable. **Experience using source control and collaborative development tools such as Git.**  Strong analytical, debugging, and problem-solving skills. **Ability to work independently, manage multiple priorities, and collaborate effectively across geographically distributed teams. ACADEMIC CREDENTIALS**  Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Electronics, or a related field. **5+ years of relevant experience in firmware, Linux device drivers, storage software, or system software development. LOCATION**  Bengaluru Comments for Suppliers: Need 6 - 9 year of experience

Pay: ₹1,400,000.00 - ₹1,900,000.00 per year

Benefits:

* Flexible schedule
* Health insurance
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

job.title: Application Developer (Senior Kernel/ROCm Developer) (KA, IN)
job.description:
Senior Kernel/ROCm Developer:

We are looking for a self-motivated and dynamic Senior Kernel/ROCm Developer with strong hands-on experience in Linux kernel, device driver, GPU compute, and ROCm software development. The ideal candidate will have 7+ years of relevant industry experience, a bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or a related field, and the ability to independently drive complex technical issues from analysis through resolution. This role involves developing, debugging, optimizing, and maintaining kernel-level and ROCm components for AMD GPU platforms while collaborating closely with cross-functional hardware, firmware, compiler, runtime, and software teams.

Key Responsibilities:

* Design, develop, debug, and maintain Linux kernel, GPU driver, KFD, and ROCm-related components for AMD GPU platforms.

* Analyze, reproduce, root-cause, and resolve complex kernel, driver, ROCm runtime, and GPU compute issues across software and hardware boundaries.

* Collaborate with hardware, firmware, compiler, runtime, validation, and application teams to enable robust GPU compute functionality and platform bring-up.

* Use advanced debugging and profiling tools such as kgdb, ftrace, tracepoints, perf, dmesg, crash dumps, ROCm tools, and GPU diagnostics to troubleshoot issues.

* Drive technical investigations independently, propose design improvements, and deliver high-quality fixes with strong ownership and accountability.

* Conduct performance analysis and optimization for kernel, driver, ROCm, and GPU compute workloads to improve stability, scalability, and efficiency.

* Participate in architecture discussions, design reviews, code reviews, and open-source-style development practices while maintaining high coding standards.

* Stay current with Linux kernel, GPU architecture, ROCm, heterogeneous compute, and open-source technology trends.

Required Skills and Qualifications:

* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or a related technical field.

* Minimum 7+ years of relevant experience in Linux kernel development, device driver development, ROCm, GPU compute software, or related system software areas.

* Strong understanding of Linux kernel architecture, device drivers, memory management, scheduling, synchronization, and kernel programming concepts.

* Hands-on familiarity with AMD GPU architecture, KFD, ROCm software stack, GPU compute, heterogeneous memory management, or similar accelerator technologies.

* Strong programming expertise in C and C++, with proven debugging experience in Linux-based system software environments.

* Experience with performance profiling, bottleneck analysis, and optimization of kernel, driver, runtime, or GPU compute workloads.

* Ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment, take initiative, and adapt quickly to changing technical priorities.

* Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and debugging skills with a strong bias for ownership and timely execution.

* Strong verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across geographically distributed teams.

Preferred Skills:

* Prior experience with KFD, DRM, amdgpu, ROCm runtime, HIP, HSA, or GPU compute driver development.

* Experience contributing to upstream Linux kernel, open-source GPU drivers, ROCm components, or other community-driven software projects.

* Knowledge of GPU virtualization, memory management, PCIe, IOMMU, NUMA, power management, or platform bring-up is a plus.

Pay: ₹1,000,000.00 - ₹1,600,000.00 per year

Benefits:

* Flexible schedule
* Leave encashment
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

job.title: Software Developer @ WhizHack Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (HR, IN)
job.description:
**Software Developer**

**Experience: 3–5 Years**  
**Employment Type: Full-time**  
**Location: In-person**   
**Company: WhizHack**

**Role Overview**

We are seeking a Software Developer with strong experience in systems programming, backend development, and cybersecurity, who is interested in working on IT and OT security systems.

You will design and build production-grade software used in enterprise and industrial environments, where reliability, safety, and correctness are more important than rapid feature churn.

This role requires the ability to reason across application, OS, and network layers, especially in industrial and high-availability environments.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Design and develop high-performance, security-aware software systems
* Build and maintain:
* Network-centric services
* Data ingestion and analytics pipelines
* Automation and internal tooling
* Work with enterprise and industrial network data
* Ensure software meets OT constraints, including:
* Non-intrusive behavior
* High availability
* Predictable performance
* Analyze and optimize:
* Memory usage
* Concurrency
* Throughput
* Troubleshoot complex issues across:
* Linux systems
* Networking stacks
* Production environments
* Mentor junior engineers and review code
* Contribute to architectural decisions and technical direction

**Required Technical Skills**

* Strong hands-on experience in two or more of:
* Python
* Go
* Rust
* C / C++
* Deep understanding of:
* Linux internals
* OS concepts (processes, threads, memory, I/O)
* Networking (TCP/IP, ARP, routing, VLANs, sockets)
* Experience building:
* Backend services
* Long-running daemons
* System-level applications
* Hands-on experience with:
* Docker and containerized environments
* Shell scripting and automation
* Git workflows

**Strong OT & Cybersecurity Preference**

* Experience or strong interest in:
* Industrial / OT environments
* Network traffic inspection and protocol analysis
* Understanding of:
* Differences between IT and OT security
* Safety-critical and high-availability systems
* Familiarity with:
* Packet analysis tools (tcpdump, Wireshark)
* Secure coding and threat modeling

**Preferred (Nice-to-Have)**

* Experience with:
* ETL or data processing pipelines
* SQL or NoSQL databases
* Performance profiling and debugging
* Exposure to:
* On-prem or air-gapped deployments
* CI/CD pipelines
* Industrial networking concepts

**What You’ll Gain**

* Ownership of core IT & OT security systems
* Work on real-world industrial cybersecurity challenges
* Exposure to critical infrastructure environments

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Pay: ₹435,293.64 - ₹1,675,920.99 per year

* Health insurance
* Leave encashment

* Provident Fund

job.title: 4G LTE / NB-IoT Layer-2 Developer (HR, IN)
job.description:
4G LTE / NB-IoT Layer-2 Developer

**Location:** Gurgaon (On-site)  
**Experience:** 5–10 Years  
**Salary:** Up to ₹20 LPA  
**Job Type:** Full-time

Job Summary

We are looking for an experienced **4G LTE / NB-IoT Layer-2 Developer** to join our engineering team. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in LTE Layer-2 protocol development, including **MAC, RLC, and PDCP**, with a solid understanding of LTE/NB-IoT and 5G NR architectures. This role involves developing protocol stack features, optimizing network performance, debugging complex issues, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality wireless communication solutions.

Key Responsibilities

* Design, develop, and maintain LTE/NB-IoT Layer-2 protocol features, including **eDRX, PSM, and Coverage Enhancement**.
* Develop and optimize MAC layer scheduling algorithms, resource allocation, and Quality of Service (QoS) mechanisms.
* Analyze, troubleshoot, and resolve Layer-2 protocol issues using logs, traces, and protocol analyzers.
* Collaborate with Layer-1 and Layer-3 teams for seamless end-to-end feature integration.
* Ensure implementation complies with applicable **3GPP standards (Release 15/16/17/18)**.
* Participate in architecture discussions, code reviews, design documentation, and test planning.
* Improve system throughput, latency, and overall network reliability.
* Support interoperability testing, field testing, and customer issue resolution.

Required Skills & Qualifications

* 5–10 years of experience in LTE protocol stack development.
* Strong understanding of **LTE/NB-IoT** and **5G NR** architecture and protocol stack.
* Hands-on experience in **LTE Layer-2 (MAC, RLC, PDCP)** development.
* Good knowledge of **3GPP Release 15/16/17/18** specifications.
* Strong programming skills in **C/C++**.
* Experience with multithreading and concurrent programming.
* Excellent debugging and analytical problem-solving skills.
* Experience with **Wireshark**, protocol analyzers, and log analysis tools.
* Working knowledge of **Git, Jenkins (CI/CD), and JIRA**.

Preferred Skills

* Experience with hardware-based testing tools such as **TM500** or **UE Simulators**.
* Familiarity with protocol analysis tools such as **QXDM** and **QCAT**.
* Experience working in Agile software development environments.

Why Join Us?

* Work on cutting-edge LTE, NB-IoT, and next-generation wireless technologies.
* Collaborate with experienced telecom engineers on impactful products.
* Competitive compensation package up to **₹20 LPA**.
* Opportunity to work on challenging protocol stack development and performance optimization.

**Interested candidates are encouraged to apply with their updated resume at teknovyrasolutions@gmail.com**

Pay: ₹1,000,000.00 - ₹2,000,000.00 per year

Work Location: In person

job.title: SAP S/4HANA Lead Developer (ABAP/BTP/Fio @ Bayer (KA, IN)
job.description:
**SAP S/4HANA Lead Developer (ABAP/BTP/Fio**

**POSITION PURPOSE:**

We are seeking a Senior Developer with deep SAP S/4HANA expertise to drive hands-on development and technical leadership of development streams. This role translates architectural designs into high-quality, performant solutions while guiding and mentoring a development team. A key differentiator is the candidate's ability to leverage AI-powered tools and emerging AI capabilities within the SAP ecosystem to accelerate delivery and drive intelligent automation.

  

**YOUR TASKS AND RESPONSIBILITIES:**

* Hands-on technical development of SAP S/4HANA solutions using ABAP (including RAP), CDS Views, and SAP Fiori/UI5, while providing technical leadership, code reviews, and coding standards to the development team.
* Champion and enforce SAP's Clean Core methodology — ensuring custom developments leverage released APIs, key user extensibility, and side-by-side extensions on BTP rather than core modifications, to safeguard upgradeability and reduce technical debt. Ideally, experience with Project Kernseife is already given.
* Translate solution designs into detailed technical specifications, development estimates, and implementation plans in close collaboration with Solution Architects and Business Process Owners.
* Actively leverage AI-powered development tools (e.g., SAP Joule, GitHub Copilot, Cline) and explore SAP Business AI services to accelerate development, improve code quality, and embed intelligent scenarios into solutions.
* Drive modern development practices including CI/CD, test-driven development, and DevOps principles within the SAP S/4HANA context.
* Stay current with SAP S/4HANA innovations and AI advancements in the SAP ecosystem and upskill the team on AI-assisted development workflows.
* Ensure solution quality through design reviews, testing, performance optimization, and provide Level 3 support for complex technical issues.

  

**WHO YOU ARE:**

* Minimum Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field, or equivalent work experience.
* 7+ years of hands-on SAP development experience with strong focus on SAP S/4HANA.
* Expert-level ABAP skills (ABAP OO, CDS Views, AMDP, RAP, BAdIs) and proven experience with SAP Fiori/UI5 and OData services.
* Strong understanding of SAP's Clean Core principles, including tier-based extensibility (on-stack vs. side-by-side), released APIs, and upgrade-safe development patterns.
* Experience leading development teams (3–8 developers) in agile delivery environments with a track record of high-quality, on-time delivery.
* Demonstrated hands-on experience with AI-assisted development tools and awareness of SAP Business AI offerings (SAP AI Core, Joule, embedded AI scenarios in S/4HANA).
* Solid understanding of SAP S/4HANA architecture, data models, and integration patterns
* Familiarity with SAP BTP extension scenarios and development lifecycle tools (gCTS, ATC, abapGit, Cloud ALM).
* Strong problem-solving and communication skills with a growth mindset and passion for continuous learning — particularly regarding emerging AI trends and their responsible application in enterprise software.
* Experience in one or more of the following domains is preferred: Finance, Supply Chain Management, Asset Management, Commercial (Order-to-Cash / Contract-to-Cash), or Analytics & Reporting.
* SAP certification in S/4HANA development is preferred.

**Ever feel burnt out by bureaucracy? Us too. That's why we're changing the way we work- for higher productivity, faster innovation, and better results. We call it Dynamic Shared Ownership (DSO). Learn more about what DSO will mean for you in your new role here**

**https://www.bayer.com/enfstrategyfstrategy**

**Bayer does not charge any fees whatsoever for recruitment process. Please do not entertain such demand for payment by any individuals / entities in connection with recruitment with any Bayer Group entity(ies) worldwide under any pretext.**

**Please don’t rely upon any unsolicited email from email addresses not ending with domain name “bayer.com” or job advertisements referring you to an email address that does not end with “bayer.com”. For checking the authenticity of such emails or advertisement you may approach us at HROP\_INDIA@BAYER.COM.**

**YOUR APPLICATION**

  
  

Bayer is an equal opportunity employer that strongly values fairness and respect at work. We welcome applications from all individuals, regardless of race, religion, gender, age, physical characteristics, disability, sexual orientation etc. We are committed to treating all applicants fairly and avoiding discrimination.

job.title: Application Developer, Full Stack @ Rolls-Royce (KA, IN)
job.description:
**Job Description**
-------------------

**Full Stack Developer**

**Bengaluru, India**

**Why join Rolls-Royce?**

At Rolls-Royce we are proud to be a business that has truly helped to shape the modern world and are committed to always being a force for progress; powering, protecting and connecting people everywhere. By joining Rolls-Royce, you’ll have the opportunity to work on world-class solutions, supported by a culture that champions belonging, creativity, and your professional growth.

**Summary**

As a Full Stack Developer, you will work with application and technical architects to translate a business need into a robust and integrated technology solution. You will be working in a fast-paced environment solving unique and challenging software problems and developing innovative solutions.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Understand complicated business problems and implement product features that are secure, scalable, robust and easily maintainable
* Ownership of technical designs, code development, and component test execution to demonstrate alignment to the functional specification.
* Good analytical skills, ready to take up challenges & passionate about writing high-quality code
* Ability to collaborate with multiple stakeholders and team members to derive value outcomes
* Collaborate with colleagues from other disciplines to define technology objectives, assess solution options and devise architectural solutions that both achieve strategic business goals and meet operational requirements
* Openly communicate with all the stakeholders. Timely communication on status & issues
* High focus on code quality, following coding standards & conventions
* High-quality unit tests, collaborate with testing team to resolve issues
* Developing and demonstrating a broad set of technology skills in Java technologies, micro service design patterns, Open-Source libraries and frameworks, and technology architecture concepts.

**Key skills and Technical Competencies**

A proven track record of successful project/product implementation with minimal of 2 years of Continuous Integration, Continuous Delivery, Pair programming and Test-Driven Development

* ASP.Net Core, C#, Web API, EF Core, ASP.Net MVC
* UI frameworks as Angular and/or React and/or Vue.JS
* HTML 5, CSS, Bootstrap, JavaScript, Typescript
* Understanding of SOLID principles and design patterns
* Knowledge of RDBMS (SQL Server)

Our vision is to ensure that the excellence and ingenuity that shaped our history continues into our future. Our multi-year transformation programs aim to turn Rolls-Royce into a high-performing, competitive, resilient and growing company. Join us, and it can be your future vision too.

Rolls-Royce are committed to being a respectful, inclusive, and non-discriminatory workplace where individuality is valued, diverse perspectives fuel innovation, and everyone can thrive
